rationale: No direct conflict. Proposed homestead exemption change concerns property tax appraisal; Educ. Code §21.551 governs teacher certification program purposes. Different statutory domains with no operative intersection.
quote: provide annual stipends to postbaccalaureate teacher certification candidates
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is possible but not a conflict with this statute's operative text, which sets program purposes rather than binding funding mandates.
